reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — Income statement line item labeled Revenue. Single consolidated revenue line, no separate segment elimination needed for consolidated total.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — Income statement line item labeled Cost of revenue.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — Explicitly reported on income statement as Gross profit. Equals Revenue minus Cost of revenue.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — Income statement line item labeled Operating income.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — Income statement line item labeled Income before income tax.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — Income statement line item labeled Income tax expense.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — Income statement and cash flow statement starting line both show 18,775 for Q1 FY2026. No NCI attribution disclosed; consolidated net income equals parent net income. CFO bridge starts from this same figure.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — Income statement line item labeled Interest expense, reported as a gross expense line of 63 (Q1 FY2026) and 64 (Q1 FY2025). Presented separately from Interest income. Normalized as a negative number per analytical convention.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — Cash flow statement addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense. This is the total-company SBC source of truth per metric rules. Also confirmed by segment reconciliation: CorporateNonSegment AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense equals the same 1,474.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — Cash flow statement addback labeled Depreciation and amortization. Single line item; no separate D&A components to sum.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — Income statement line labeled Diluted weighted average shares. Reported in millions; converted to raw count.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — Balance sheet line item labeled Cash and cash equivalents.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Marketable securities. These are current marketable securities functioning as short-term investments.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Accounts receivable, net. Pure trade AR; no combined presentation requiring breakout.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — Balance sheet line item labeled Inventories. Breakout available in xbrl_not_on_statement: raw materials 2,525, WIP 5,339, finished goods 3,469 (Apr 27 2025).
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Accounts payable. Presented as a standalone line; pure trade AP, not combined with accrued liabilities.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — Balance sheet line item labeled Total assets.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — Balance sheet line item labeled Total shareholders equity. No NCI present; this is total stockholders equity attributable to parent.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: No current portion of long-term debt, commercial paper, or short-term borrowings appear on the balance sheet or in XBRL data. Current liabilities consist only of Accounts payable and Accrued and other current liabilities. Set to 0.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Long-term debt. Confirmed by xbrl_not_on_statement us-gaap:LongTermDebt which equals the same value. Net of unamortized discount and issuance costs of 36 per Note 9.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement (component of AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent per Note 8 extensible list disclosure) — 300 (Apr 27 2025) and 288 (Jan 26 2025). Non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent on balance sheet face — 1,521 (Apr 27 2025) and 1,519 (Jan 26 2025). Total operating lease liabilities = current + non-current = 1,821 (Apr 27 2025) and 1,807 (Jan 26 2025). No double counting: non-current is a separate BS line; current is embedded in AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent but disclosed separately in notes.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — Cash flow statement line item labeled Net cash provided by operating activities.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — Cash flow statement line item labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets. This is the capital expenditure line. Normalized as a negative number per analytical convention.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — Cash flow statement line item labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired. Normalized as a negative number per analytical convention.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — Income statement line item labeled Research and development.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent — From xbrl_not_on_statement; component of AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent disclosed in Note 8. Used in net debt calculation (metric 15) separately from non-current.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — Balance sheet face line item labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — Income statement line item labeled Interest income. Disclosed separately from interest expense; used in unlevered FCF approximation and interest coverage context.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not explicitly disclosed as a supplemental cash flow item in this filing. For metric 21 (Unlevered FCF), approximate with income-statement gross interest expense of 63 (Q1 FY2026).
company_mapping.accrued_and_other_current_liabilities: us-gaap:AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent — Balance sheet face. Includes operating lease current per Note 8 extensible list. As-reported value retained as-is per normalization rules.
company_mapping.segment_compute_networking_revenue: ComputeAndNetworkingSegmentMember Revenue — Segment data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_graphics_revenue: GraphicsSegmentMember Revenue — Segment data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_compute_networking_operating_inc: ComputeAndNetworkingSegmentMember Operating Income — Segment data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_graphics_operating_income: GraphicsSegmentMember Operating Income — Segment data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_data_center: DataCenterMember — ProductOrServiceAxis Revenue by End Market.
company_mapping.revenue_gaming: GamingMember — ProductOrServiceAxis Revenue by End Market.
company_mapping.revenue_professional_visualization: ProfessionalVisualizationMember — ProductOrServiceAxis Revenue by End Market.
company_mapping.revenue_automotive: AutomotiveMember — ProductOrServiceAxis Revenue by End Market.
company_mapping.revenue_oem_and_other: OEMAndOtherMember — ProductOrServiceAxis Revenue by End Market.
company_mapping.diluted_shares_adjustment: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberDilutedSharesOutstandingAdjustment — xbrl_not_on_statement IS; dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards used in diluted shares bridge.
company_mapping.total_employees: Not in this filing (10-Q). Carry forward from most recent 10-K per metric 18 rules.
